ol.li: If follower does not find entry in log with PrevLogIndex and PrevLogTerm, it must refuse new entries (Success = false).
If an existing entry conflicts with a new one (same index but different terms), delete the existing entry and all that follow it.
Append any new entries not already in the log.
If LeaderCommit > commitIndex, set commitIndex = min(LeaderCommit, index of last new entry).

div.p: Followers return ConflictTerm and ConflictIndex to allow the leader to bypass multiple failed RPCs and decrement nextIndex by an entire term at once.

g.text: Leader's term. Receiver updates term if Term > currentTerm.
Receiver redirects clients to this ID.
Index of log entry immediately preceding new ones.
Term of PrevLogIndex entry. Must match receiver's log.
Log entries to store (empty for heartbeat).
Leader's commitIndex. Used to update follower's local commitIndex.
